case_title: EDWARD COOPER VS. NICHOLAS SHER ET AL

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (19CV00433) (TRANSACTION ID # 63223349) FILED BY DEFENDANT SHER, NICHOLAS , AN INDIVIDUAL
PROOF OF SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 63474518) FILED BY DEFENDANT SHER, NICHOLAS , AN INDIVIDUAL
BRIEF IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND FOR SANCTIONS (TRANSACTION ID # 63495441) FILED BY DEFENDANT SHER, NICHOLAS , AN INDIVIDUAL
DECLARATION OF NAVI SINGH DHILLON IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND FOR SANCTIONS (TRANSACTION ID # 63495441) FILED BY DEFENDANT SHER, NICHOLAS , AN INDIVIDUAL

DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, HEARING RE: DEFENDANT NICHOLAS SHER'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND FOR SANCTIONS. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING HEARD BY THE PRO TEM JUDGE. DEFENSE COUNSEL DO NOT STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING HEARD BY THE PRO TEM JUDGE. THE MATTER IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 12, 2019 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 302, LAW & MOTION. DEFENSE COUNSEL ARE INSTRUCTED TO PAY TO REQUIRED LOCAL COURT REPORTER FEE IN ADVANCE OF THE 8/12/19 HEARING. JUDGE PRO TEM: SCOTT BORROWMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED (302/JPT)

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT. 302, THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED ON DEFENDANT NICHOLAS SHER'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND FOR SANCTIONS AS FOLLOWS: THE COURT ADOPTS THE REPORT AND RECOMMENDATION OF THE JUDGE PRO TEM. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER REGARDING ANY ALLEGED DEFICIENCIES IN PLAINTIFF'S DISCOVERY RESPONSES. BOTH PARTIES' REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF IS TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING AND ATTACHES THE REPORT AND RECOMMENDATION OF THE JUDGE PRO TEM AND SUBMIT IT IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED. (302/EPS)

Re-Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-12-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted on DEFENDANT NICHOLAS SHER's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And For Sanctions as follows:

The Court adopts the report and recommendation of the judge pro tem. Defendant's motion to compel discovery responses and for sanctions is denied. The parties are ordered to meet and confer regarding any alleged deficiencies in plaintiff's discovery responses. Both parties' requests for sanctions are denied.

Counsel for the plaintiff is to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling and attaches the report and recommendation of the judge pro tem and submit it in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
